creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->ohauer

Hi Jason, do you really think it is nessesary to ask about the 
apache licence agreement in pkg-install? 

We have to do this for the java binarys (jdk/jre) but not for 
apache licenced projects. 

Have you tested your patch also against tomcat-5.5.31 which 
includes some scecurity fixes?
